questionHtml:
Which genotype would be normally found in a gamete?

A. Rr

B. RS

C. rStt

D. TUt

meta.title: Which genotype would be normally found in a gamete? A. Rr B. RS C. rStt D. TUt
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.1. Production of haploid gametes in parents and their fusion to form a diploid zygote as the means of inheritance
